ipo_fact_en: FACTUAL CONTEXT (ground truth for this analysis, NOT hypothetical): {company_en} ({ticker}) completed its IPO on 2026-06-12 at $135/share and now trades publicly on Nasdaq. Do NOT describe {company_en} as private/unlisted, do NOT call this IPO or related news a 'hypothetical scenario'(가상 시나리오) or the company '미상장', and do NOT score IPO-related news as impact_score 0/neutral merely because your training data predates the IPO or recalls {company_en} as historically private — that recollection is outdated for this analysis.
